text:
is a 36 page booklet that includes the 17 page manga and various illustrations by the staff of the film Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It was given to the audience of the Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time re-release. It carries the name of the previous EVA-EXTRA booklets released since 2009.

Table of Contents

P.01-17 Evangelion 3.0 (-120 min.) by Kazuya Tsurumaki, Hidenori Matsubara and Mahiro Maeda
P.18 Naoyuki Asano (Animation Director)
P.19 Shuichi Iseki (Animation Director)
P.20 Shuichi Iseki (Animation Director)
P.21 Shuichi Iseki (Animation Director)
P.22 Shuichi Iseki (Animation Director)
P.23 Shuichi Iseki (Animation Director)
P.24 Masayoshi Tanaka (Animation Director)
P.25 Masayoshi Tanaka (Animation Director)
P.26 Atsushi Nishigori (Chief Animation Director)
P.27 Mahiro Maeda (Director)
P.28 Kouichi Arai (Animation Director)
P.29 Masanori Iwasato (CGI Rigging Director)
P.30 Yusuke Matsui (CG Animation Director)
P.31 Sejoon Kim (Mecha Animation Director)
P.32 Kazuya Tsurumaki (Director)
P.33 Hideaki Anno (Chief Director) Special Contribution
